2606.31651.title: FARS: A Fully Automated Research System Deployed at Scale
2606.31651.paper_summary: Recent automated research systems show that language-model agents can generate hypotheses, run experiments, and write complete manuscripts, but most evidence still comes from selected examples, human-framed topics, or a few pre-defined research tasks. We present FARS (Fully Automated Research System), a fully automated AI-for-AI research system designed to operate across research topics at scale. FARS autonomously generates and advances projects through ideation, planning, experimentation, and writing, using stage-specific agents coordinated through a shared workspace that records proposals, code, logs, results, and manuscripts. In its first public deployment, FARS produced 166 complete research papers spanning 67 fine-grained AI/ML topics while preserving intermediate artifacts as an auditable corpus rather than a curated set of successes. We evaluate this corpus with 282 structured reviews from volunteer reviewers covering 140 papers, including overall ratings, sub-scores, integrity checks, and LLM-use disclosure. The reviews indicate that FARS can produce review-worthy and occasionally strong AI/ML research artifacts in a large-scale public deployment, while also exposing recurring failure modes in narrow experimental scope, methodological limitations, and integrity issues.
2606.31651.paper_summary_zh: 最近的自動化研究系統顯示，語言模型代理可以生成假設、進行實驗並撰寫完整的手稿，但大多數證據仍來自於選定的範例、人為框架的主題或少數預定義的研究任務。我們提出了FARS（完全自動化研究系統），這是一個設計用於在大規模研究主題上運作的完全自動化的AI-for-AI研究系統。FARS自主生成並推進項目，涵蓋構思、規劃、實驗和寫作，使用通過共享工作空間協調的階段特定代理，該工作空間記錄提案、代碼、日誌、結果和手稿。在其首次公開部署中，FARS生成了涵蓋67個細分AI/ML主題的166篇完整研究論文，同時保留中間產物作為可審核的語料庫，而不是策劃的一組成功案例。我們用282份來自志願審稿人的結構化評審來評估這個語料庫，涵蓋140篇論文，包括整體評分、子分數、完整性檢查和LLM使用披露。評審表明，FARS能夠在大規模公開部署中產生值得審查的，並且偶爾強大的AI/ML研究產物，同時也暴露了狹窄實驗範圍、方法學限制和完整性問題中的反覆失敗模式。
2606.31651.author: Qiong Tang et.al.
2606.31651.authors: Qiong Tang, Xiangkun Hu, Xiangyang Liu, Yiran Chen, Yunfan Shao
